description: Build and maintain core product features, migrating legacy AngularJS components to React and TypeScript. Stayed through the Supermetrics acquisition, helping integrate teams and processes. Focused on performance optimization, test coverage with Cypress and Jest, and accessibility improvements across the platform.

Led development of 3+ MEAN stack applications from inception to production for energy-sector clients. Cut page load times by 75% (12s to 3s) with Redis caching and optimized database queries. Set up RabbitMQ for cross-server communication to handle batch processing at scale. Mentored junior developers and ran code reviews across the team.

Built a client-facing web application for a major American insurance company using Spring and Hibernate. Automated health checks and testing workflows, reducing manual effort by 40%. Mentored junior developers and managed delivery timelines across the team.
